name_cn:
Authentic Grade
🆕SERPENTI FOREVER EAST-WEST Small Shoulder Bag❤
Crafted from pink calfskin, interpreting timeless elegance with a fashionable and avant-garde silhouette.
The piece features a practical leather shoulder strap adorned with the classic Serpenti head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection, suitable for daily wear. It includes a single compartment, a front pocket, a back patch pocket, an interior quilted pocket, three card slots, a customizable vanity mirror, and is accented with the BULGARI metal logo on the back.
Dimensions: 22 X 15 X 4.5 cm
Model: 292104
